title: action.approved.v1
description: SPEC I (Wave I, AMD-03) — Action Platform envelope: a requested action has been human-APPROVED for execution under a named policy version. Registered in Apicurio as brain/action.approved.v1 (JSON Schema artifact under FULL_TRANSITIVE, AMD-03 R1). Partition key = brand_id (I-S01). SCAFFOLD ONLY — no executor runs. GOVERNANCE: approval binds the action to policy_version + approved_by; execution_mode 'auto' still requires holdout support + per-executor rollback to be reachable (Wave-I gate). PII (I-S02): approved_by is an auth-principal id, never raw PII; money in payload is bigint minor + currency_code.

brand_id.description: Tenant key — brand_id-first (I-S01). Kafka partition key.

action_id.description: The action being approved (same id as its action.requested.v1). Idempotency key = (brand_id, action_id).

executor.description: Targeted executor adapter (matches an @brain/action-core ExecutorPort name).

execution_mode.description: Mode this approval authorizes. 'auto' is only meaningful once the Wave-I governance gate is satisfied.

payload.description: Executor-specific instruction body (money = bigint minor + currency_code; no raw PII).

approved_by.description: REQUIRED auth-principal user id of the human approver (audit, never raw PII). Governance: no 'auto' execution without a human-approved policy version — this field + policy_version are that record.

policy_version.description: REQUIRED versioned decision-policy id that authorizes this action (packages/decision-policies, Wave H). Governance gate precondition for autonomous execution.

holdout_group.description: OPTIONAL incrementality cohort label (carried from day one).

approved_at.description: OPTIONAL ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the approval.
